name: phase09_intent_generates
outcome_goal: IntentBox generates new apps when no template matches, manifest generator produces valid V2 manifests

jobs.label: p9_intent_generate_button
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Update src/modules/input/IntentBoxModule.tsx to support app generation:

The current code searches templates via /api/templates?q=QUERY. When no templates match, it shows a message but doesn't generate anything.

Add:
1. When search returns zero templates AND zero components, show a 'Generate App' button (accent color, prominent)
2. Clicking 'Generate App' calls POST /api/manifests/generate with {intent: text}
3. Show a loading state with animated dots: 'Generating your app...'
4. On success: show the generated manifest explanation, then a 'Launch App' button that navigates to /?manifest=<generated_id>
5. On error: show error message with 'Try Again' button

The /api/manifests/generate endpoint already exists and returns {manifest_id, manifest, version, confidence, explanation}.

IMPORTANT: The generation can take 30-120 seconds (LLM call). The loading state must be clear and patient.

Keep all existing functionality (search, browse all). Write the updated file.

jobs.label: p9_v2_manifest_generator
